title: Nametag Recipe Backport
description: Nametag Recipe backported from 26.1 to older versions
body:
# Nametag Recipe Backport

Backports the **modern nametag crafting recipe from Minecraft 26.1** to older versions — making nametags craftable instead of loot-only.

## Features:

- Adds the **updated nametag recipe** from Minecraft 1.26.1

- Craft **1 Nametag** using **1× String + 1× Metal Nugget** (Iron / Gold / Copper in newer versions)

![Nametag Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0bba21e3221568d3383dd6c8778c76792e0a970c.gif)

## Compatibility:

- **Mod**: Minecraft 1.20 – 1.21.11

- **Datapack**: Minecraft 1.20 – 1.21.11

**No dependencies needed**
